paper_title: Exploring the Limits of Transfer Learning with a Unified Text-to-Text Transformer
evaluation_method: SuperGLUE benchmark evaluated using T5-style text-to-text prompts as introduced by Raffel et al. (2020). Each SuperGLUE task is reformulated as a generative task with task-specific prefix prompts. The model generates text output, which is compared to expected class labels. This follows the T5 methodology where all NLP tasks are cast into a unified text-to-text format, and evaluation checks whether generated text matches any valid class label.
metric: task-dependent (accuracy, F1, exact match); overall is average across tasks
